name: Alkane Resources Limited
analysis: ALK has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$1.6000, stop A$1.3167, target A$1.8100 (0.74:1) — then trail it.
